refnamediv.refpurpose: Creates a geometry instance from a TWKB ("Tiny Well-Known Binary") geometry representation.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The ST_GeomFromTWKB function, takes a a TWKB ("Tiny Well-Known Binary") geometry representation (WKB) and creates an instance of the appropriate geometry type.

refsection.title: Examples
